content.en:
The Golden Silk Dao Ancestor looked at Ye Tian in disbelief, Ye Tian actually comprehended the Immeasurable Dao Domain!

This is the exclusive ability of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor, and it actually appeared in a Dao Ancestor in the early stage of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor.

If someone had told him before, that a Dao Ancestor in the early stage of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor would possess an immeasurable Dao domain, he would never believe it.

But at the moment, he had to believe.

He thought that his talent was very demonic, but after seeing Ye Tian, he realized that he was really nothing.

After Ye Tianshi exhibited the Infinite Dao Domain, he knew that he was not an opponent.

Rumble!!!

The Golden Silk Dao Ancestor was controlled by Ye Tian's Infinite Dao Technique, the Endless Golden Spear, which directly penetrated many defenses, and his body was also penetrated.

Even if his life-saving ability and recovery ability are very strong, he is also injured at this moment.

Thundered!!!!

Under the confrontation again and again, the Golden Silk Daozu's injuries became more and more serious, but he did not hurt Ye Tian once.

In the end, Golden Silk Daozu chose to admit defeat.

"I throw in the towel!"

Golden Silk Daozu hurriedly said.

Although he could continue to fight, it was only a dying struggle, and there was no need for that.

At the same time, those Ninefold Ancestors were dumbfounded one by one.

"Endless Dao Ancestor actually has an immeasurable Dao domain, how is this possible!"

"The Endless Dao Ancestor is too demonic, just in the early stage of the Eightfold Primordial Ancestor, he actually mastered the Immeasurable Dao Domain, which shows that his will has reached the Immeasurable Will, and he has comprehended the Immeasurable Dao. "

"The Golden Silk Dao Ancestor is already very good, and its combat power is enough to rival the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor of the Nine-Fold Building, but unfortunately it is still a little worse than the Endless Dao Ancestor!"

"I've heard before that the Endless Dao Ancestor is very likely to have raised his life level to 9.9 in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm, and now it seems that he is even more demonic than I imagined!"

"The potential of the Endless Dao Ancestor is unimaginable, it definitely has the strongest posture!"

"The possibility of the strongest posture is too low, even if the Endless Dao Ancestor is evil, it will only have an advantage in the Eightfold Origin Ancestor. When he reached the Ninefold Ancestor, everyone had the Immeasurable Dao Domain, and his advantage was gone. It is useless to practice quickly, and it has no advantage against the impact of the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor. "

"That's right, some of the Ninefold Primordial Ancestors are more demonic than those Strongest Ninefold Primordial Ancestors in the process of cultivation, but they haven't broken through so far! When they reach the peak of the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor, what they see is not talent, but chance. When the opportunity comes, it is possible to break through, talent or anything is useless!"

"I can't say that, no matter what, there will definitely be no problem for the Endless Dao Ancestor to surpass us in the future!"

......

Next, Ye Tian defeated the Eightfold Origin Ancestor Peak Dao Ancestor of the Nine-Fold Building with his strong strength, and successfully captured a place with an undefeated record.

At the same time, his strength can be regarded as completely exposed.

Even if Jiu Chong Lou wanted to block the news again, it would be difficult to do so, because there were many Dao Ancestors who were concerned about this battle this time, and they couldn't block them all.

Moreover, when Ye Tian became one of the deputy owners of the Xuanlou, everything was clear, and he could guess it, how could he block the news!

It didn't take long.

The number of the truncated Xuanlou landlord and the three deputy landlords has all been decided.

Truncated the owner of the Xuanlou Building as a half-step nine-fold original ancestor - Qingyao Dao Ancestor!

The deputy owners of the building are the three eightfold ancestors of the Endless Dao Ancestor Ye Tian, the Heartless Dao Ancestor, and the Mengyang Dao Ancestor.

Ancient Spring Xuanlou.

At this time, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor learned that the deputy owner of the Xuanlou was Ye Tian, and he was immediately shocked.

He knows very well that the gold content of the deputy owner of the Xuanlou is very high, even higher than the gold content of him, the owner of the Guquan Xuanlou.

Because everyone knows that in the future, the truncated Xuanlou will definitely become one of the ground towers, and may even become one of the sky towers.

If you become one of the deputy owners of the Xuanlou now, there are too many benefits!

Therefore, this time, the incomparably demonic eightfold ancestor peak demons of the Guquan Xuanlou all participated, and it is conceivable how terrifying the competition is!

"Endless Dao Ancestor is too terrifying!"

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor was shocked.

Originally, he thought that Ye Tian would need a long time before he could hope to catch up with him, but he didn't expect Ye Tian to catch up with him so quickly.

He felt that with his current combat strength, he should not be able to defeat Ye Tian.

"Immeasurable Dao Domain, according to the news that came, the Endless Dao Ancestor has mastered the Immeasurable Dao and the Immeasurable Will, and I haven't fully comprehended the Immeasurable Dao now!"

Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor sighed.

Now, Ye Tian has become one of the deputy owners of the Xuanlou, and it is not suitable to call himself a member of the Guquan Xuanlou, so he must leave the Guquan Xuanlou.

However, after all, Ye Tian was a member of the Guquan Xuanlou, so his performance was still above the Guquan Xuanlou, and the resource ration of the Guquan Xuanlou would definitely be much more next time.

After a period of time, the construction of the truncated Xuanlou was officially completed.

At this time, Ye Tian also officially became one of the deputy owners of the Xuanlou.

At this time, he saw the other two deputy owners of the Xuanlou and the owner of the Xuanlou, Qingyao Daozu.

Qing Yao Dao Ancestor is a female Dao Ancestor, but she is very demonic.

She once raised her life level to 9.8 when she was a half-step sevenfold ancestor, and she almost raised her life level to 9.9, although she failed later, but it was enough to be demonic.

And now, Qing Yao Dao Ancestor has comprehended the Infinite Dao, and is about to condense the Immeasurable Will, and is one of the demons who is extremely promising to condense the Immeasurable Dao Ancestor in the realm of the Half-Step Ninefold Origin Ancestor.

Although she couldn't match Ye Tian's qualifications, she was also demonic enough, so she seized the position of the landlord who cut off the Xuanlou.

And it is rumored that she is a descendant of the peak of a certain Ninefold Ancestor, so her identity background is not ordinary.

After becoming the deputy owner of the truncated Xuanlou, Ye Tian obtained a large number of resources.

For him, this batch of resources is already unimaginable wealth, enough for him to squander for a long time.

In addition, Ye Tian had extremely high authority and could enter some treasure lands that he was not qualified to enter before.

Immediately, Ye Tian was ready to enter one of the ground-level treasures of the Nine-Story Building, the Sea of Dazzling Light.

The Sea of Glare is one of the treasures suitable for the cultivation of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor or the Half-Step Ninefold Ancestor, which can greatly improve the cultivation, but due to the limited energy of the Glare Sea, it will take a long time to give birth to some energy.

Therefore, entering the Sea of Glare requires extremely high permissions.

Before, Ye Tian was not qualified to enter, and he didn't even know about the existence of the Sea of Dazzling Light, but now he is qualified.

And entering the Sea of Dazzling Light is the entry fee alone requires 50 million points, and the longer you practice, the more points you need.

However, he has just become the deputy owner of the Truncated Xuanlou and has been rewarded with hundreds of millions of points, so there is no shortage of points.

Soon, Ye Tian applied to enter the Sea of Dazzling Light to practice.
